title: nephrodium decurtatum
intro: Nephrodium decurtatum, also known as the cut-leaved fern, is a species of fern native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. The cut-leaved fern can be prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
